channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1350] Parent doesn't exist!
item.description:
On one MDT log, we have a lot of messages (~2000) send to syslog like :

1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) header@ffff880f99689780[0x0, 1, [0x208306b93:0x51c6:0x0] hash]

{ 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdt@ffff880f996897d8mdt-object@ffff880f99689780(ioepoch=0 flags=0x0, epochcount=0, writecount=0) 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....cmm@ffff880f0e93bc40[local] 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdd@ffff880fdfb29300mdd-object@ffff880fdfb29300(open_count=0, valid=0, cltime=0, flags=0) 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....osd-ldiskfs@ffff881020b328c0osd-ldiskfs-object@ffff881020b328c0(i:(null):0/0)[plain] 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) }

header@ffff880f99689780
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) Parent doesn't exist!
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18464:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) header@ffff881e78f90380[0x0, 1, [0x208306b93:0x9a34:0x0] hash]{
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18464:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdt@ffff881e78f903d8mdt-object@ffff881e78f90380(ioepoch=0 flags=0x0, epochcount=0, writecount=0)
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) header@ffff880f99689780[0x0, 1, [0x208306b93:0x51c6:0x0] hash]

{ 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdt@ffff880f996897d8mdt-object@ffff880f99689780(ioepoch=0 flags=0x0, epochcount=0, writecount=0) 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....cmm@ffff880f0e93bc40[local] 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdd@ffff880fdfb29300mdd-object@ffff880fdfb29300(open_count=0, valid=0, cltime=0, flags=0) 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....osd-ldiskfs@ffff881020b328c0osd-ldiskfs-object@ffff881020b328c0(i:(null):0/0)[plain] 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) }

header@ffff880f99689780
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 18525:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) Parent doesn't exist!
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) header@ffff880f99689780[0x0, 2, [0x208306b93:0x51c6:0x0] hash]

{ 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdt@ffff880f996897d8mdt-object@ffff880f99689780(ioepoch=0 flags=0x0, epochcount=0, writecount=0) 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....cmm@ffff880f0e93bc40[local] 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....mdd@ffff880fdfb29300mdd-object@ffff880fdfb29300(open_count=0, valid=0, cltime=0, flags=0) 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) ....osd-ldiskfs@ffff881020b328c0osd-ldiskfs-object@ffff881020b328c0(i:(null):0/0)[plain] 1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) }

header@ffff880f99689780
1335060942 2012 Apr 22 04:15:42 mdt kern warning kernel Lustre: 17146:0:(mdt_handler.c:888:mdt_getattr_name_lock()) Parent doesn't exist!

It doesn't seems to create more issues than filling the log.
Isn't it a brother of LU-1098 ?

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: master patch tracking at http://review.whamcloud.com/2648
b2_1 patch tracking at http://review.whamcloud.com/2608
yes, I think it's like LU-1098, it's a valid delete and getattr race against parent object, we can also lower the debug level.

Bobijam

Could you please look into this one and see whether it is related to LU1098?

Thanks

Peter
